new_classes.label_en: Other Still Wine of Fresh Grapes in containers ≤ 2 L (CN 2204 21 98)
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Stillwein aus frischen Weintrauben in Behältnissen ≤ 2 L (KN 2204 21 98)
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes, in containers holding 2 litres or less, that does not fall under any more specific subheading within 2204 21 (i.e., not Champagne, Prosecco, Tokaj, PDO wine, PGI wine, or wine with high total dry extract as defined in additional note 4), where the non-volatile constituents of the total dry extract include sugars, glycerol, tannins, tartaric acid, colouring matter and salts.

coverage_explanation: The proposed axioms capture the main distinguishing criteria for CN 2204 21 98: (1) wine of fresh grapes (parent class), (2) still (not carbonated, complement of SemiSparklingWine), (3) in containers of ≤ 2 L (SmallContainer restriction via BFO has_part), (4) residual/other category excluding PDO, PGI, Tokaj, and high-total-dry-extract wines (complement restrictions). The TotalDryExtractQuality someValuesFrom axiom models the legal text's reference to non-volatile dry extract constituents (sugars, glycerol, tannins, tartaric acid, colouring matter, salts). Coverage is reduced because: (a) the precise numeric threshold for 'high' total dry extract from additional note 4(A) cannot be captured without the full text of that note and a datatype range restriction (the threshold distinguishing 2204 21 78 from 2204 21 98 is not provided in the legal note text given); (b) additional notes 4 and 5 are referenced but their full content is not available for axiomatisation; (c) the complement pattern in OWL (using rdf:type as property_iri for complement restrictions) is a modelling approximation — true complement-of-subclass disjointness would require owl:disjointWith axioms which are not directly expressible in the current restriction schema.
